endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}/customerSubscriptions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}/customerSubscriptions/{customerSubscriptionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CUSTOMERSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real customersubscriptionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}/customerSubscriptions/{customerSubscriptionName}
endpoints.description: Creates a new customer subscription under a registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CUSTOMERSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real customersubscriptionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureStack/registrations/{registrationName}/customerSubscriptions/{customerSubscriptionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a customer subscription under a registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CUSTOMERSUBSCRIPTIONNAME}} with a real customersubscriptionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{REGISTRATIONNAME}} with a real registrationname.
